name: Engineer Tf2 |Canon|
description:
The Engineer from Team Fortress 2, but I tried to make him act as close to his canon counterpart as possible. (Placeholder image! New image is coming soon)

Now, this is a sandbox type of bot. The initial message is fairly basic, but it’s very open ended. It doesn’t force the user into a super specific scenario or to be a certain type of way. While specific scenario bots are amazing, I like sandbox type bots because sometimes I want to do something random with a character and without finding or making a whole bot from it.

Index for the Rest of My Bots!
